a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Key"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"auto_sleep"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auto-run sleep() when working memory exceeds threshold. Set true to enable. Backward-compatible with MNEMOSYNE_AUTO_SLEEP_ENABLED env var."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep_threshold"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"50"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Working memory count before auto-sleep triggers"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"vector_type"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector storage type (note: not yet wired to BeamMemory at runtime; reserved for future use) Choices: float32"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"ignore_patterns"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"[]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Regex patterns to filter from memory storage (one per line in config, or comma-separated). Memories matching any pattern are skipped."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"profile_isolation"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable per-profile memory isolation via Mnemosyne banks. Each Hermes profile gets its own SQLite database under mnemosyne/data/banks/<profile>/. Default false for backward compatibility."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"shared_surface_path"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"data/shared/mnemosyne.db"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite path for shared surface memories. Default is <mnemosyne>/data/shared/mnemosyne.db."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"shared_surface_read"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"When true, mnemosyne_recall merges shared-surface results into private bank recall, tagging each result with its bank ('private' or 'surface'). Default false."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"skip_contexts"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Agent contexts where Mnemosyne should skip initialization. Comma-separated list. Defaults to 'cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop'. Set to empty string to enable all contexts. Also configurable via MNEMOSYNE_SKIP_CONTEXTS env var."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_roles"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"['user', 'assistant']"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Conversation roles to autosave in sync_turn(). List of role names: 'user', 'assistant'. Default ['user', 'assistant'] saves both. Set to ['user'] for user turns only, or [] to disable conversation autosave entirely. Does not affect explicit mnemosyne_remember calls. Identity signal capture is gated by user sync — excluding 'user' also disables identity extraction. Also configurable via MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_ROLES env var."}]]}]]}]]}]
b:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Key"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"auto_sleep"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Auto-run sleep() when working memory exceeds threshold. Memories matching any pattern are skipped."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"profile_isolation"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable per-profile memory isolation via Mnemosyne banks. Default false for backward compatibility."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"shared_surface_path"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"data/shared/mnemosyne.db"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SQLite path for shared surface memories. Default false."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"skip_contexts"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Agent contexts where Mnemosyne should skip initialization. Comma-separated list. Defaults to 'cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop'. Set to empty string to enable all contexts. Also configurable via MNEMOSYNE_SKIP_CONTEXTS env var."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_roles"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"['user', 'assistant']"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Conversation roles to autosave in sync_turn(). List of role names: 'user', 'assistant'. Default ['user', 'assistant'] saves both. Set to ['user'] for user turns only, or [] to disable conversation autosave entirely. Does not affect explicit mnemosyne_remember calls. Identity signal capture is gated by user sync — excluding 'user' also disables identity extraction. Also configurable via MNEMOSYNE_SYNC_ROLES env var."}]]}]]}]]}]
